retry_reason: The put operation is unconditional on a non-NULL pointer; there is no failure path to retry.
contract_summary: Put wrapper that decrements the reference count of a seccomp_filter (and its ancestor chain). When the refcount reaches zero, the filter is freed via seccomp_filter_free. The caller must ensure that orig is valid (non-NULL) and holds a reference. After calling this function, the caller must not use the orig pointer (or any filter in the chain) because it may have been freed. This function handles the full chain cleanup iteratively, so the caller does not need to track the prev pointer separately.
